headline: Old Dominion Unveils Solid LTL Unit Performance for May
summary: ODFL's May LTL revenue per day rose 12.3% as revenue per hundredweight climbed, though shipments and tons per day fell.

raw.headline: Old Dominion Unveils Solid LTL Unit Performance for May
raw.summary: ODFL's May LTL revenue per day rose 12.3% as revenue per hundredweight climbed, though shipments and tons per day fell.

headline: Volaris Reports Increase in Consolidated Load Factor for May
summary: VLRS' May load factor climbed to 86.2% as traffic rose 4.9% and capacity dipped 0.4%, with international gains helping offset softer domestic demand.

raw.headline: Volaris Reports Increase in Consolidated Load Factor for May
raw.summary: VLRS' May load factor climbed to 86.2% as traffic rose 4.9% and capacity dipped 0.4%, with international gains helping offset softer domestic demand.

headline: Expeditors International (EXPD) Up 4.9% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Expeditors International (EXPD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: CHRW Unveils AI System for Real-Time Supply Chain Optimization
summary: CHRW's new AI system automates 92% of global 4PL shipments and cuts supply chain assessments from weeks to minutes, boosting efficiency and resilience.
